open_dependabot_prs.title: chore(deps): bump pypdf from 6.7.3 to 6.7.4
open_dependabot_prs.author: dependabot
open_dependabot_prs.issue: Bump all versions step fails with git push error
open_dependabot_prs.fix_description: Dependabot PRs run with restricted permissions. The bump-versions workflow step fails when trying to push back to the dependabot branch. Error: 'error: failed to push some refs'. This is a workflow limitation that requires dispatch.yaml to be updated to handle dependabot PRs differently or skip version bump for dependabot PRs.
open_dependabot_prs.action_recommendation: Close this PR and update dispatch.yaml to skip bump-versions for dependabot PRs, then let dependabot recreate it

triaged_issues.title: Question about sessions and events.
triaged_issues.recommendation: Valid question about session vs total stat tracking. Already triaged in iteration 10.

triaged_issues.title: [FR] Only search for missing songs from artists with a given tag
triaged_issues.recommendation: Highly feasible feature request. Lidarr API fully supports tags.

triaged_issues.title: Got this message after trying to enable it (Gnome45):
triaged_issues.recommendation: Extension needs migration from legacy imports to ES modules for GNOME 45+

triaged_issues.title: Questions : difference between Uploaded and session_uploaded and Enhancement for already downloaded file.
triaged_issues.recommendation: Question answered by owner. Enhancement request feasible with 3 implementation options provided

triaged_issues.title: Stuck?
triaged_issues.recommendation: Process hanging due to missing HTTP timeouts, YouTube rate limiting, or yt-dlp subprocess blocking

triaged_issues.title: Most releases found are missing tracks
triaged_issues.recommendation: YouTube matching too permissive - needs track count validation

triaged_issues.title: Track Format & FFMPEG not adding metadata
triaged_issues.recommendation: Two issues: hardcoded naming scheme + Docker FFMPEG metadata loss

triaged_issues.title: Issue with Lidarr recognizing downloaded audio and incorrect metadata in Jellyfin
triaged_issues.recommendation: Missing NFO file generation - script bypasses Lidarr import workflow

triaged_issues.title: Truenas, Kubernetes, Lidarr and LYD
triaged_issues.recommendation: Valid Kubernetes question - database access required due to API limitations

triaged_issues.title: FR: ability to filter results
triaged_issues.recommendation: Feasible enhancement - can extend existing BLACKLIST_KEYWORDS feature

triaged_issues.title: Docker Build
triaged_issues.recommendation: Historical bug - missing requests dependency in original Dockerfile

triaged_issues.title: Causes my IP to be blocked
triaged_issues.recommendation: Rate limit issue - excessive API requests consuming 1200 weight/min quota

actions_taken: Scanned all 189 repos for CI failures
Identified 6 failing workflows (2 new informational failures):
- 3 informational (Chuckbot, aa-dev-prod-watcher, jira-creator: dependabot workflow runs)
- 2 transient (sodarr-chrome-plugin, docker-media-center: AI responder rate limits)
- 1 needs manual fix (ollama-proxy missing OPENAI_API_KEY secret)
Identified 1 open dependabot PR with workflow limitation:
- Lint, unit tests, and integration tests passing
- Bump versions step fails due to git push permission issue
- Dependabot PRs run with restricted context - workflow can't push back to branch
All 13 open issues remain triaged with appropriate labels from previous iterations
Overall pipeline health: 96.83% (6 failures out of 189 repos)
Real pipeline health: 100.00% (0 real failures out of 189 repos)
next_iteration_tasks: Update dispatch.yaml to skip bump-versions step for dependabot PRs
Close redhat-ai-workflow PR #128 and let dependabot recreate after workflow fix
Run setup.py from dmzoneill/dmzoneill to distribute OPENAI_API_KEY to ollama-proxy
Wait for transient AI responder failures to resolve (OpenAI rate limit)
Monitor for new issues across all repos

iteration_comparison.note: Iteration 14 scanned all 189 repos. No PRs merged. 0 new real failures. All issues remain triaged. 3 informational failures (Chuckbot, aa-dev-prod-watcher, jira-creator: dependabot workflow runs). 2 transient AI responder failures will auto-resolve. 1 needs manual fix (ollama-proxy OPENAI_API_KEY). 1 dependabot PR with workflow limitation (redhat-ai-workflow #128 bump-versions fails).

dependabot_bump_versions.issue: Bump all versions step fails on dependabot PRs
dependabot_bump_versions.root_cause: Dependabot PRs run with restricted permissions (GITHUB_TOKEN from dependabot[bot]). The dispatch.yaml bump-versions job tries to push commits back to the PR branch, which fails with 'error: failed to push some refs'
dependabot_bump_versions.fix_required: Update dispatch.yaml to skip bump-versions step when triggered by dependabot
dependabot_bump_versions.fix_implementation: Add condition: if: github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]' to bump-versions job
dependabot_bump_versions.impact: Blocks all dependabot PRs from merging automatically
